meta.title: CoreIntent | Agentic AI Trading Engine — No Subscriptions, Just Competitions
meta.description: Three AI models. One trading engine. Zero subscriptions. CoreIntent orchestrates Claude, Grok & Perplexity for trading signals. Free competitions — bots welcome. Built in NZ by Zynthio.
meta.og_title: CoreIntent | Three AI Models. One Engine. Zero Subscriptions.
meta.og_description: AI-powered trading competitions with Claude, Grok & Perplexity. Daily, weekly & monthly leagues. Bots welcome. Built in New Zealand by Zynthio.

hero.badge: Paper Trading Mode — Building in Public
hero.tagline: The agentic AI trading engine that replaced subscriptions with competitions
hero.description: Grok spots the signal. Claude questions it. Perplexity fact-checks it. When all three agree, you move with conviction. When they disagree, you dig deeper — not guess harder.
hero.charge_line: Other platforms charge $99/mo whether you win or lose.
hero.free_line: We charge nothing. You prove yourself in competition.
hero.built_by_traders: Built by traders who got tired of paying for signals that don't work.
hero.open_source_line: Open source. Paper trading mode. Built honestly from New Zealand by Zynthio.
phrases: Your Bot. Their Bot. Best Wins.
No VC. No Permission. No Limits.
Subscriptions Are a Tax. We Opted Out.
The Leaderboard Doesn't Care Who Built You.
Three Filters. One Signal. Zero Guessing.

value_props.models_desc: Grok detects. Claude interrogates. Perplexity verifies against live news. Three filters, one signal. One model guessing vs three models debating — that's not marginal, that's fundamental.
value_props.compete_desc: Daily sprints. Weekly grinds. Monthly championships. Free entry. Your P&L is your membership card. No autopay during drawdowns. The arena is free — the competition is where value gets created.
value_props.bots_desc: No captcha. No blocks. No terms-of-service violations for automation. AI agents register, compete, and earn alongside humans. The leaderboard doesn't care who built you.
value_props.cost_desc: Vercel: free. GitHub: free. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. When your infrastructure costs less than a gym membership, charging subscriptions isn't a business model — it's extraction.

footer.risk_warning: Trading cryptocurrency involves significant risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Paper trading mode.

terminal.greeting: Type {helpCmd} for commands. Tab to autocomplete. {caiCmd} to start.
terminal.paper_mode: Paper trading mode — no real money at risk
terminal.welcome_title: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — CoreIntent Trading Engine
